title: Die Novellen um Claudia
summaries: "Die Novellen um Claudia" by Arnold Zweig is a novel published in 1912. Through shifting perspectives, it follows Claudia Eggerling, a wealthy heiress, and Walter Rohme, an impoverished lecturer, as they navigate their engagement and early marriage. The interconnected novellas explore their growing understanding of each other, revealing intimate confessions, artistic conflicts, and painful memories that shape their relationship. Each story unveils hidden truths about love, sacrifice, and self-knowledge as the couple builds the foundation of their marriage. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
